# tags / table

The **tags** (multi-value) type's `data-view.cell` capability.

Contributes `DataViewSlots.Cell({ match: "tags", ... })` — a read-only `TagsCell`
that renders each tag in `props.values` as a muted `Badge` chip on one truncating
line, resolving each tag to its `field.options` label when present (else the raw
value).

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Tags (multi-value) field type: data-view table cell (read-only tag chips).
- Web:
  - Contributes: `DataViewSlots.Cell` "tags" → `TagsCell`
  - Uses: `primitives/badge.Badge`, `primitives/data-view.DataViewSlots`
